questions.question:
\( \textbf{Assertion (A):} \) Increase in carbon dioxide would melt polar ice. 

\( \textbf{Reason (R):} \) Global temperature would rise.



Others: NIELIT 2022 April Scientist B | Section A | Question: 23
options: Both \( \text{(A)} \) and \( \text{(R)} \) are true but \( \text{(R)} \) is not the correct explanation of \( \text{(A)} \)
Both \( \text{(A)} \) and \( \text{(R)} \) are true and \( \text{(R)} \) is the correct explanation of \( \text{(A)} \)
questions.correct_answer: Both \( \text{(A)} \) and \( \text{(R)} \) are true but \( \text{(R)} \) is not the correct explanation of \( \text{(A)} \)

questions.question:
The Ohio State Leadership Studies revealed _________ and initiating structure as two major dimensions of leadership behaviour:



Others: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 135

Which style of leadership focuses on goals, standards, and organization?



Others: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 144

Directions: Answer questions (24-25) on the basis of following instructions :

Instructions: For the Assertions \( \text{(A)} \) and Reason \( \text{(R)} \) below, choose the correct alternative from the following :

(I) Both \( \text{(A)} \) and \( \text{(R)} \) are true and \( \text{(R)} \) is the correct explanation of \( \text{(A)} \).

(II) Both \( \text{(A)} \) and \( \text{(R)} \) are true and \( \text{(R)} \) is not the correct explanation of \( \text{(A)} \).

(III) \( \text{(A)} \) is true but \( \text{(R)} \) is false.

(IV) \( \text{(A)} \) is false but \( \text{(R)} \) is true.

Assertion \( \text{(A)} \): The filament in an electric bulb does not burn up although its temperature is about \( 2700^{\circ} \mathrm{C} \) when it glows.

Reason \( \text{(R)} \): Bulb filament is made of tungsten.



Others: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section A | Question: 24
